title: Marketplace Manager - GKB Opticals - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - GKB Opticals - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Join the GKB Opticals family as a Marketplace Manager in Chennai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About GKB Opticals:
GKB Opticals is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GKB Opticals!
